description:
A screenshot of a file selection dialog within a software application, showing files related to EAGLE Mapping (BarCoding) templates. The breadcrumb path shows "D3.2.1 - Demonstration and docume..." and "EAGLE Mapping (BarCoding)". The dialog displays a file list with "Name", "Änderungsdatum" (Modification Date), and "Typ" (Type) columns.

The listed files are:
*   "Riparian_Zones_2018_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3..." (Microsoft Excel file, modified 21.03.2022 15:15).
*   "SIOSE_LC_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3.1.2_23.12.2..." (Microsoft Excel file, modified 21.03.2022 16:54).
*   "SIOSE_LU_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3.1.2_23.12.2..." (Microsoft Excel file, modified 21.03.2022 16:54).
*   "Urban_Atlas_2018_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3.1..." (Microsoft Excel file, modified 10.03.2022 15:57).

The file "Urban_Atlas_2018_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3.1..." is highlighted, and its full name, "Urban_Atlas_2018_EAGLE Barcoding Template_3.1.2_23.12.2021_v1", is shown in the "Dateiname" (Filename) input field. The dialog also contains an "Alle Dateien" (All Files) filter and an "Öffnen" (Open) button. This interface is used for selecting dataset input parameters for class codes during data ingestion.
